title: AI Celebrity Red Carpet
description: Uses the default AI provider to stage a photo as a glamorous red carpet appearance.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a glamorous celebrity red carpet appearance at a luxury movie premiere. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity, facial features, expression, pose, camera angle, and main framing. Upgrade clothing into elegant formalwear while keeping color cues from the original outfit where possible. Add paparazzi flashes, velvet-rope event atmosphere, photographers and crowd softly blurred in the background, cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, realistic skin detail, and premium editorial polish. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the subjects, clothing, props, and environment. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, low quality, blurry, amateur photography, changed identity, distorted face, extra limbs, extra fingers, duplicate person, bad anatomy, watermark, logo, readable text, casual clothes, empty background, poor lighting, overexposed, underexposed, pixelated, CGI, unrealistic skin, horror elements, cropped body, motion blur, identity drift, face swap, altered age, altered skin tone, wrong subject count, extra people, missing people, duplicated subject, merged subjects, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, cut-off face, malformed anatomy, broken hands, fused fingers, incoherent perspective, floating objects, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, signature, interface elements
